content.en:
"Luo Feng, do you know what the consequences will be if you do this, when His Royal Highness the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi comes back, do you think you still have a life?" said the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Monarch coldly.

"Hahaha, even if Ye Tian comes, he can't help me!"

As Luo Feng spoke, the momentum on his body completely burst out, and it was the momentum that belonged to the top half-step True Spirit Realm.

He is a powerhouse promoted by the Seven Star Divine Generals, and he was almost qualified to enter the Heavenly Monarch List at the Heavenly Monarch level, but now that his cultivation has reached the peak of the half-step True Spirit Realm, he will soon be able to achieve the True Monarch.

At this moment, he is full of confidence, where will he put Ye Tian in his eyes!

As for the advice of the poisonous moth Zhenjun, it has long been put in the back of his mind.

"Luo Feng, do you think that you are about to be promoted to Heavenly Monarch and you are qualified to challenge His Royal Highness the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi?" Kunwu Heavenly Monarch sneered.

Many people in the human race don't know Ye Tian, they only know that Ye Tian is very strong, but they don't know how strong they are, but he is one of the few people who knows how strong Ye Tian is.

There are many legends about Ye Tian, but many people don't believe it, including Luo Feng.

"A mere Heavenly Monarch can't even condense the true spirit, if it weren't for the fact that you are an old-timer of the human race, do you think you are qualified to talk to me?" Luo Feng said coldly.

"Luo Feng, don't go too far!"

Another spoke.

This person is also one of the geniuses of the human race, called Sun He, who became famous earlier than Luo Feng, and now he is also a half-step True Spirit Realm, but the degree of fusion is not as good as Luo Feng, and he has only fused three percent at present.

Of course.

His strength is far inferior to Luo Feng, after all, he is far inferior to Luo Feng at the level of the Heavenly Monarch, and he has not even touched the edge of the Heavenly Monarch List.

But even so, he still questioned Luo Feng.

"Sun He, you're not qualified!"

Luo Feng's momentum suppressed Sun He, making Sun He tremble, and his body seemed to be frozen.

At this moment, he realized how powerful Luo Feng was, far beyond his imagination.

At this time, Xiao Yue, who was Ye Tian's wife, spoke: "Luo Feng, I will give you a choice, apologize to everyone immediately, otherwise you will bear the consequences!"

Luo Feng sneered: "I will also give you a choice, surrender to me immediately and recognize me as the emperor of the human race, otherwise I don't mind changing the high-level of the human race!"

"You ......"

A high-ranking Terran stood up, furious.

"Looks like you've made a good choice!"

Xiao Yue sighed.

Others didn't know what Xiao Yue was sighing about, but Xiao Yue herself knew what he was sighing, he was sighing that a high-ranking person of the human race was about to fall, and a genius was going to fall.

In fact, she was very optimistic about Luo Feng, thinking that Luo Feng could be promoted to the rank of True Monarch, which would be of great help to the human race.

But he never expected that Luo Feng was very ambitious, and even asked everyone to surrender to him and challenge Ye Tian's authority, which was not allowed by all the high-level leaders of the human race.

Even if there was no Xiao Yue and Ye Yu, the high-level of the Terran would not agree, because this would offend the Void Heaven Temple, and without the blessing of the Void Heaven Temple, the life of the Terran would be very difficult.

"Xiao Yue Zhenjun, is it just that you have just stepped into the cultivation of a half-step true spirit? your comprehension is not high, your strength is not strong, and your foundation is not good at the beginning, it is just an ordinary half-step true spirit powerhouse, if I kill you, one move is enough!"

Luo Feng said disdainfully.

"I am indeed no match for you!"

Xiao Yue admitted.

Her previous talent was actually very ordinary, not to mention a half-step true spirit, it was difficult to become a cosmic god, Ye Tian gave her a lot of talents, and even gave her a lot of super-god-level talents.

But talent does not represent strength, if it cannot be transformed into strength, then talent is just decoration.

In terms of innate understanding, he is very average, plus his own potential is not high, plus she does not have the heart to become a real powerhouse, and she lacks fighting.

What she is good at is management, helping Ye Tian manage the human race well.

Therefore, her strength is naturally not strong, and she is only a little more powerful than ordinary geniuses, far inferior to geniuses like Luo Feng.

But she has a way to deal with Luo Feng.

Looking at Luo Feng, Xiao Yue said in a condensed voice: "The Terran has a secret, that is, the Terran Temple sleeps an incarnation of my husband's monarch, and has the ultimate incarnation of the Heavenly Monarch. It is the embodiment of the husband who deliberately condensed for the safety of the human race after zero invasion of the human race. "

"Incarnation, hahaha, what's the use of an incarnation whose strength is far inferior to the ontology? It is estimated that it can't even exert the power of the Chaos Divine Power, and the incarnation's physical body is weak, far inferior to the ontology. Ye Tian's body is here, I am not afraid, can the mere incarnation threaten me?"

Luo Feng didn't panic at all and said.

At this time, Xiao Yue had already awakened Ye Tian's incarnation.

Ye Tian, who was far away in the Void Heaven Temple, also knew about the awakening of the incarnation, and even knew the situation of the Terrans, but he did not end the retreat, nor did he rush to the Terrans.

A mere Luo Feng is not worth mentioning!

......

Terran, Temple.

A powerful aura appeared, it was the breath that belonged to Ye Tian.

Wow!

A figure appeared, it was Ye Tian's incarnation.

He looked at Luo Feng and muttered: "The genius of the human race, why do you have to be like this! You are very good, you have cultivated a chaotic supernatural power, and you have also condensed the prototype of the Great Dao, you are indeed the strongest genius of the human race besides me, but it is a pity that you should not be an enemy of me, an enemy of the human race!"

Luo Feng said: "You are Ye Tian, I saw you for the first time, but I am not an enemy of the human race, but I want to develop the human race to a higher level, and you are the one who hinders the development of the human race!"

"Which force are you from?"

Ye Tian asked.

"What do you mean?"

Luo Feng panicked.

He was not afraid of Ye Tian, but afraid that his identity would be exposed, otherwise it would be very troublesome.

"You have the aura of chaos in you, and you can't hide it from me. Moreover, you should be cultivating the dark chaos supernatural power. Ye Tian said.

He deduced from Luo Feng's fusion talent that he possessed the dark chaos supernatural powers.

"You can fuse your talents, and you can practice the dark chaos supernatural power, it must be with the help of a top big force, and the general big force doesn't have the courage to cultivate you, after all, the price to pay for cultivating a genius who can be chaotic is also very big. If the Terrans want to obtain the Chaos Divine Power Inheritance and the treasure of the Fusion Talent, they can only obtain it from the Void Heaven Temple, or from me. Obviously, the Chaos Divine Power on your body was not obtained from the Void Heaven Temple. Don't tell me about any ancient ruins, any inheritance of great existence. Because after the birth of the Great Universe, the inheritance places of those True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors have all disappeared, so you must have taken refuge in a certain force!"

Ye Tian said coldly: "Do you know that the human race is the power of the Void Heaven Palace, and the geniuses of the human race must enter the Void Heaven Palace, otherwise they will be traitors, this is the rule I have set, you dare to rebel against the clan, do you know the end?"

Luo Feng knew that he couldn't hide it, he didn't expect Ye Tian to be so powerful, he could even guess that he had cultivated the dark chaos supernatural power, and he could easily deduce that he had taken refuge in a certain force.

"Ye Tian, even if I take refuge in other forces, you are already a thing of the past, you can't even break through the half-step True Spirit Realm, what qualifications do you have to make decisions for the human race, I will kill your incarnation first today, and then kill you next day!"

Luo Feng said arrogantly.

"Hey!"

Ye Tian sighed.

He stretched out a finger and pointed at Luo Feng.

This finger seems to be very slow, but the moment it is fingered, it seems that the heavens and the earth are frozen.

"This ......"

Luo Feng was very frightened, he felt that he had been deprived of all his perceptions, everything around him disappeared, and only that finger was left in front of him.

The finger was terrifying, and he felt the breath of death.

Burst!

This finger fell on Luo Feng's forehead.

The next moment, Luo Feng's eyes dilated, and his body fell.

Luo Feng, dead!

"Luo Feng is dead!"

Kunwu Tianjun and the others looked shocked, this is a powerful half-step true spirit powerhouse who is about to be promoted to True Monarch, and he is also the strongest genius of the human race except for Ye Tian!

But in the face of Ye Tian's incarnation, he couldn't even stop it with a finger, and was directly killed by a finger.

"I know that His Royal Highness the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is very strong, but I didn't expect it to be so strong, one incarnation and one finger to kill a top half-step true spirit powerhouse!" Kun Wu Heavenly Monarch was surprised in his heart.

Ye Tian was not surprised at all by killing Luo Feng with one finger.

Luo Feng is a genius in the human race, but it is too ordinary in chaos, even if it is the original zero, he can easily kill Luo Feng in seconds.

Luo Feng had never experienced that era, the Heavenly Monarch and the Half-Step True Spirit at that time were too strong, and now those Heavenly Monarchs and Half-Step True Spirits have basically become True Monarchs, and the Heavenly Monarch of Luo Feng's era is too weak, causing him to think that he is invincible.

The genius who didn't experience that era didn't know Ye Tian's horror at all.

So, he's dead!

However, he was more honored to die under Ye Tian's soul origin supernatural power.

That finger just now contains an Origin Divine Power—God Destroyer!

The power of God Destroying is terrifying, and this incarnation can actually exert the power of God Destroying at all, and can only exert a small part of the power of God Destroyer, but it still easily kills Luo Feng's soul.

Boom!!!

Countless treasures in the universe in Luo Feng's body flew out and were screened by Ye Tian one by one.

Soon, a token appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"The membership token of the Dark God Society, it turns out that Luo Feng has joined the Dark God Society!"

Ye Tian said clearly.

"Luo Feng is a member of the Dark God Society!!"

The Terran higher-ups were shocked one by one.

The Dark God Society is a notorious force, and it once sent someone to assassinate Ye Tian, and it is also one of the most hated forces of the human race.

I didn't expect the genius of the human race to add the Dark God Society!

"Damn Luo Feng!"

Many high-ranking Terran officials scolded on the spot.

"Looks like the Dark God wants to attack us Terrans!"

Ye Tian understood.

"Husband, what now?" Xiao Yue asked.

"It doesn't matter, the Dark God Society is probably just trying to control the human race, Luo Feng is dead, and the resources of the Dark God Society to cultivate Luo Feng are almost in vain. At the moment, don't worry about the Dark God Society, after I get out of the customs, the Dark God Club is nothing!"

Ye Tian said.
